data.narrative:
Unseenlabs is a Series C space technology company that has raised €112.5M to date. The valuation analysis draws from a peer set of five same-stage, same-sector private companies in Space & Aerospace: Axiom Space, Impulse Space, Varda Space Industries, Skyryse, and Isar Aerospace. Public comparables in the sector (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) trade at a median P/S multiple of 64.2x but cannot be applied without disclosed revenue figures for the target.

The peer-median method is the primary triangulation approach. The five private comparables valued between $1.0B and $2.5B, with a median of $1.5B. This distribution reflects legitimate variance within the cohort—Axiom Space at the high end ($2.5B) versus Isar Aerospace at the low end ($1.0B)—suggesting differentiation by maturity, technology specificity, or market position within the sector.

The triangulated valuation range is $1.3B to $1.7B, centered on the peer median of $1.5B. Key uncertainties include the representativeness of the five peer companies relative to Unseenlabs' specific market position and the timing of recent rounds within the comparable set. With only one applicable method, the range reflects median peer valuation rather than methodological triangulation. Revenue disclosure or more granular performance metrics would enable public-comp anchoring and strengthen conviction in any specific point estimate.
